---
title: "<span class='letter-cap'>C</span><span class = 'fancy'>ontact</span> <span class='letter-cap'>M</span><span class = 'fancy'>e</span>"
include-in-header:
    text: |
      <style>
        h1, h2, h3 {
          color: #A30B37;
        }
        .bi-envelope-fill {
        color: #A30B37;
        }
        a.about-link {
        border-color: #a30b37;
        }
        .about-link-text {
          color: #a30b37;
          weight: bold;
        }
        .quarto-title p {
          font-color: #212529;
          font-weight: normal;
        }
      </style>
---

Email: **shimurthy \[at\] ucdavis.edu** <br> Department of Political Science <br> University of California, Davis

One Shields Avenue <br> Davis, CA 95616


<!-- Website for adding a form: https://medium.com/@amccollum.dev/creating-a-functional-contact-form-on-your-website-92aef7dd6c1d -->
